title: Shared Configuration
description: Portable settings that travel with your private fork. Defines canonical variable names and their meanings; actual path values stay in machine.json on each machine. Commit this file to your private fork — not to the public claude-dotfiles repo.

variables.description: Canonical variable names and their human-readable descriptions. Keys are the variable names (used in commands and CLAUDE.md as $NAME). Values are descriptions of what they represent — not paths. Actual paths are in machine.json on each machine. This lets you write commands that reference $NOTES and know that every machine will map that to wherever notes live locally.

additionalProperties.description: Human-readable description of what this variable represents.

commands_enabled.description: Which built-in commands from the public repo to activate. Names match filenames in commands/ without the .md extension.

greeting_once_per_day.description: Show the greeting only on the first session of each day.

seclog_on_session_start.description: Run /seclog automatically at the start of every session that does not begin with the full greeting.
